text: Main CBI se bol raha hoon. Aapka Aadhaar card money laundering case mein involved hai. Turant respond karo warna arrest warrant issue hoga.
Supreme Court ka order hai ki aapko turant pesh hona hoga. Aapke khilaf FIR darj hai money laundering ke liye. Agar abhi nahi aaye toh police bhej denge.
Yeh CBI ka confidential matter hai. Kisi ko mat batao warna aur serious charges lagenge. Aapko cooperation karna hoga.
This is Central Bureau of Investigation calling. Your Aadhaar number has been flagged in an ongoing money laundering investigation. You must cooperate immediately or face arrest.
We have a non-bailable warrant issued against your name. You need to appear before the magistrate within two hours. Transfer the security deposit to avoid arrest.
This is Indian Customs Department. A parcel addressed to you containing illegal drugs and counterfeit currency has been intercepted. Your passport will be cancelled if you do not cooperate.
Customs department se bol rahe hain. Aapke naam pe ek parcel aaya hai jismein drugs aur fake currency hai. FIR darj hone wali hai aapke khilaf.
A package from China addressed to you has been seized at Mumbai Airport. It contains 5 fake passports and narcotics. You are now under investigation by the Narcotics Control Bureau.
Enforcement Directorate has frozen your bank accounts due to suspicious transactions linked to a hawala network. Pay the penalty amount immediately to unfreeze your accounts.
Enforcement Directorate se bol rahe hain. Aapke bank account se suspicious transactions hui hain jo hawala racket se judi hain. Fine bharo warna arrest hoga.
This is Reserve Bank of India calling. Your account has been flagged for fraudulent activities. You must verify your identity by transferring a security deposit of Rs 50,000.
RBI se bol rahe hain. Aapka account freeze hone wala hai suspicious activity ki wajah se. Account bachane ke liye abhi verification fee jama karo.
Your bank KYC is expired. Your account will be blocked within 24 hours. Click the link to update your KYC immediately or visit the nearest branch with Rs 5000 processing fee.
Aapka KYC expire ho gaya hai. 24 ghante mein aapka account block ho jayega. Abhi apna Aadhaar aur PAN card details bhejiye warna paisa nahi nikal payenge.
This is the Cyber Crime Police. We have evidence of your involvement in an online fraud case. You are being placed under digital arrest. Do not disconnect this call or leave your house.
Cyber Crime Police se bol rahe hain. Aap digital arrest mein hain. Call disconnect mat karo aur ghar se bahar mat jao. Kisi ko bataya toh aur case lagega.
Income Tax Department notice. You have unpaid taxes of Rs 2,50,000. Your bank accounts will be seized if payment is not made within 2 hours. Call this number immediately.
Income Tax Department se notice. Aapka 3 lakh ka tax pending hai. 2 ghante mein account seize ho jayega. Turant payment karo is number pe.
Congratulations! You have won Rs 25 lakh in the KBC lottery. To claim your prize, please pay the processing fee of Rs 10,000 via UPI to this number.
Badhai ho! Aapne KBC mein 50 lakh jeete hain. Prize claim karne ke liye 15,000 rupaye processing fee bhejiye UPI pe. Offer sirf aaj tak valid hai.
Guaranteed 500% returns in just 30 days through our cryptocurrency trading platform. Minimum investment Rs 1 lakh. Join our exclusive WhatsApp group now.
Stock market mein guaranteed profit. Daily 5000 se 10000 kamao. Bas 50,000 invest karo. Humari team sab handle karegi. Abhi join karo.
I am sending you money but the transaction failed. Please accept the UPI collect request of Rs 5000 to complete the refund process.
Main aapko paisa bhej raha hoon lekin transaction fail ho raha hai. Please UPI collect request accept karo refund ke liye.
Aapke paas sirf 2 ghante hain. Rs 50,000 immediately transfer karo ya police aayegi. Kisi ko mat batao warna aur serious charges honge.
You have only one hour to resolve this matter. Transfer Rs 1 lakh as security deposit to this account. If you tell anyone, additional charges of conspiracy will be added.
Your Aadhaar card has been used to open 17 bank accounts for money laundering. Share your Aadhaar number and OTP for verification or face permanent blacklisting.
Aapke Aadhaar se 15 bank accounts khule hain money laundering ke liye. Aadhaar number aur OTP bhejiye verification ke liye warna blacklist ho jaoge.
FedEx courier service calling. A package sent from your address to Taiwan contains 5 kg of illegal substances. NCB is being notified. Cooperate to avoid prison.
TRAI notification: Your mobile number will be blocked in 2 hours due to illegal activities. Press 1 to connect with the cyber crime officer and resolve this.
TRAI se suchna. Aapka mobile number 2 ghante mein block hone wala hai illegal activities ki wajah se. 1 dabaye cyber crime officer se baat karne ke liye.
Stay on this video call. You are under digital surveillance by CBI. Any attempt to disconnect or contact anyone will result in immediate physical arrest at your location.
Video call pe raho. Aap CBI ki digital surveillance mein ho. Call kaat diya ya kisi ko bataya toh abhi police bhej denge aapke ghar pe. Cooperate karo.
